channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Broken fence panel obstruction on pavement, 29th June
item.description:
Reported over a week ago on Lewisham clean my street app but no action to clear the rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Trundley's Road, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Highway design in Green Lane junction with William Barefoot Drive London SE9 needs revisiting review as it has created hazardous, chaotic and congested traffic issues., 29th June
item.description:
Highway design in Green Lane junction with William Barefoot Drive London SE9 needs revisiting review as it has created hazardous, chaotic and congested traffic issues.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poor configuration of road layout, signage and road markings William Barefoot Drive intersection with Green Lane New Eltham has caused issues with congestion, delays to public transport bus services, dangerous vehicle movements and risk to pedestrians. A deep review of the configuration at this site is urgently required to seek improvements to safety, traffic flow and improved bus services., 29th June
item.description:
Poor configuration of road layout, signage and road markings William Barefoot Drive intersection with Green Lane New Eltham has caused issues with congestion, delays to public transport bus services, dangerous vehicle movements and risk to pedestrians. A deep review of the configuration at this site is urgently required to seek improvements to safety, traffic flow and improved bus services.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Need “slow horses” signs desperately along the road, 29th June
item.description:
All the way down Hockenden lane there are stables and farm land. There are horses walking up and down that road constantly yet there are absolutely no signs which say “slow”, “horses” or 30mph limit. My daughter has had several near misses with drivers flying round corners completely unaware that horses go down the road. It is only a matter of time before a car will injure or kill a horse and or rider. The road ideally needs to be a 20mph zone but at least have some 30mph signs up as drivers are going at the national speed limit at almost 60 in some places. There needs to be clear signs that say Horses and Slow!! The road is a danger without them. I have also contacted swanley council who deal with one end of the road .
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hockenden Lane, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 274 Green Lane London SE9 3TJ New Eltham. Poor configuration of road layout, signage and road markings William Barefoot Drive intersection with Green Lane New Eltham has caused issues with congestion, delays to public transport bus services, dangerous vehicle movements and risk to pedestrians. A deep review of the configuration at this site is urgently required to seek improvements to safety, traffic flow and improved bus services., 29th June
item.description:
274 Green Lane London SE9 3TJ New Eltham. Poor configuration of road layout, signage and road markings William Barefoot Drive intersection with Green Lane New Eltham has caused issues with congestion, delays to public transport bus services, dangerous vehicle movements and risk to pedestrians. item.title: Tree needs pruning, affecting road, 29th June
item.description:
Tree needs pruning as it is growing out onto the road and affecting road space
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whitebeam Avenue, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Littering bread and rice, 29th June
item.description:
Someone keeps throwing loads of bread out their window onto the grass behind this block, and now someone is throwing rice too. I’ve been living here for two months and it’s been constant - and I’m worried about it attracting more pests.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cazenove Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over flowing wheelie by allotment, 29th June
item.description:
Has been left their for weeks full of stinking rubbish and full of dog poop that lid will not shut. It smells so bad and flies /maggots. We have no litter bins in our street at all. Our road is very busy with high level traffic going to from school (our lady of grace) people empty the rubbish from their cars every day. Their is no where for dog walkers to dispose of dog mess so just gets left on pavement. Their as never been a litter bin in highcome. We get all sorts of rubbish blowing up and down road. If we had a propper litter bin either end of road would improve our road massively thank you
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wyndcliff Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Holmesdale house, 29th June
item.description:
The street light has come off and is dangling down, the light still works but now faces down as it’s not secure and blows in the wind.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, West End Lane, Kilburn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on pavement - Oldhill street, 29th June
item.description:
Multiple acts of stencilled graffiti on Oldhill street outside Kosher Spot and Mesora Books.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oldhill Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mount Pleasant Lane, Hackney, London

item.title: Fly tipped bin in alleyway next to gable cottage on camden road, 29th June
item.description:
There is a green circular bin thats been dumped in the alleyway/ walk way to bexley woods next to gable cottage in camden road. This was empty but now people are filling it up with rubbish, can this please be removed asap.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camden Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal advertising banner, 29th June
item.description:
This is regarding an unauthorised advertising banner 2’x4’. Fixed to the bridge which spans the A2 part of Arbuthnot Lane Bexley.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Arbuthnot Lane, Blendon, Greater London

item.title: 239 Bowes Road N11, 29th June
item.description:
A vehicle has been burned and is been left outside 239 Bowes Road N11. The pavement is damaged and the wall of the house has also been damaged. Unable to access pavement due to the vehicle being left unattended.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bowes Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Biohazard waste issue under nappy behind bush, 29th June
item.description:
Nappy over waste making it un biodegradable. A biohazard and unpleasant.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Taylors Lane, Forest Hill, Greater London
